creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sylvio Cesar Teixeira wrote:
> Hi, to freedink-dfarc and freedink-engine is possible to support to NLS
> (USE_GETTEXT)?
>
> Please, put support to it.
>   

Yes, it looks like it uses NLS by default without registering a 
dependency... I'll fix this and follow up with a newer patch set.
